home.greeting: Glad you’re here — I’m Ahmed Al-Sawah.
home.intro: I’m a software engineer focused mainly on frontend development. I build real web products with tools like Svelte, React, and Next.js.
now: I work at Quran.com as a Frontend Developer, where I help turn Quranic and educational content from CMS-managed material into actual product experiences: lessons, interactive ayah widgets, review cards, and quizzes.

I also work at Nuqayah.com as a Software Engineer, contributing to products that mostly serve education, Arabic text, and Quranic content. My work there spans learning platforms, admin dashboards, Mushaf and Tafsir tools, audio transcription, and font analysis, depending on what the project needs — frontend, backend, CMS work, or application QA.

I’m in my final year of studying Computer Science at UoPeople.edu, and I recently completed my studies in Educational Technology at Al-Azhar University. That mix of software and education has naturally shaped the kind of projects I’m drawn to.
